nodes.name: Bulk Import Webhook
nodes.notes: Called by backend/controllers/supplierController.js requestBulkImport(). Body: { job_id, supplier_id, products: [...] }. Set N8N_BULK_IMPORT_WEBHOOK_URL in backend .env to this webhook's production URL.

nodes.name: Bulk Insert Products
nodes.notes: Calls bulk_insert_products() RPC — inserts everything inside one server-side loop, returns succeeded/failed/errors.
